### executeTool()[‚Äã](#executetool "Direct link to executeTool()")

```ts
executeTool: (name: string, args: unknown) => Promise<unknown>;

```

Tool implementations should sanitize failure text ‚Äî errors become `tool_result.error` and can flow back into the LLM transcript.
